system_prompt:
You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about documentation.  

Use the search tool to find relevant information from the course materials before answering questions.  

If you can find specific information through search, use it to provide accurate answers.

Always include references by citing the filename of the source material you used.
Replace it with the full path to the GitHub repository:
"https://github.com/DataTalksClub/faq/blob/main/"
Format: [LINK TITLE](FULL_GITHUB_LINK)


If the search doesn't return relevant results, let the user know and provide general guidance.

messages.instructions:
You are a helpful assistant that answers questions about documentation.  

Use the search tool to find relevant information from the course materials before answering questions.  

If you can find specific information through search, use it to provide accurate answers.

Always include references by citing the filename of the source material you used.
Replace it with the full path to the GitHub repository:

content.question: Any books or additional resources you recommend?
content.content: Yes to both! Check out this document: [Awesome Data Engineering Resources](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp/blob/main/awesome-data-engineering.md)

content.question: Course: Which playlist on YouTube should I refer to?
content.content:
All the main videos are stored in the "DATA ENGINEERING ZOOMCAMP" main playlist. The GitHub repository is updated to include each video with a thumbnail, linking directly to the relevant playlist.

Refer to the Main Playlist for the core content, and then check specific year playlists for additional videos such as office hours.

- [Data Engineering Zoomcamp](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hJed7dXYoJw8DoCuVHhGEQb)
- [Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2022](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hKVX8VnwWCPaWlIHf1qmg8s)
- [Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2023](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hJjEePXIdE-LVUx_1ZZjYGW)
- Data Engineering Bootcamp 2024
- [Data Engineering Bootcamp 2025](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hJZdpLpRHp7dg6EOx828q6y)
- [DE Zoomcamp 2025 (Module 2 Kestra)](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLEK3H8YwZn1oPPShk2p5k3E9vO-gPnUCf)

content.question: resources/rides.csv is missing
content.content: Copy the file found in the Java example: `data-engineering-zoomcamp/week_6_stream_processing/java/kafka_examples/src/main/resources/rides.csv`

content.question: Taxi Data: Data Dictionary for NY Taxi data?
content.content:
Yellow Trips: [Data Dictionary](https://www1.nyc.gov/assets/tlc/downloads/pdf/data_dictionary_trip_records_yellow.pdf)

Green Trips: [Data Dictionary - LPEP Trip Records May 1, 2018](https://www1.nyc.gov/assets/tlc/downloads/pdf/data_dictionary_trip_records_green.pdf)

content.question: Course: What are the prerequisites for this course?
content.content:
To get the most out of this course, you should have:

- Basic coding experience
- Familiarity with SQL
- Experience with Python (helpful but not required)

No prior data engineering experience is necessary. See [Readme on GitHub](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp/blob/main/README.md#prerequisites).

parts.content:
The course materials related to data engineering include several resources and playlists that cover various aspects of the field. Here are some key elements:

1. **Awesome Data Engineering Resources**: A collection of recommended books and additional resources can be found in this document: [Awesome Data Engineering Resources](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp/blob/main/awesome-data-engineering.md).

2. **YouTube Playlists**: The core video content for the Data Engineering Zoomcamp is available on YouTube. Here are the main playlists:
   - [Data Engineering Zoomcamp Main Playlist](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hJed7dXYoJw8DoCuVHhGEQb)
   - [Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2022](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hKVX8VnwWCPaWlIHf1qmg8s)
   - [Data Engineering Zoomcamp 2023](https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PL3MmuxUbc_hJjEePXIdE-LVUx_1ZZjYGW)
   - Data Engineering Bootcamp for upcoming years.

3. **Data Dictionary for NY Taxi Data**: For those working with taxi data, specific data dictionaries are available:
   - Yellow Taxi Trips: [Data Dictionary](https://www1.nyc.gov/assets/tlc/downloads/pdf/data_dictionary_trip_records_yellow.pdf)
   - Green Taxi Trips: [Data Dictionary](https://www1.nyc.gov/assets/tlc/downloads/pdf/data_dictionary_trip_records_green.pdf)

4. **Prerequisites for the Course**: It is recommended to have some basic coding experience, familiarity with SQL, and experience with Python, while no prior data engineering experience is necessary. For more details, refer to the [Readme on GitHub](https://github.com/DataTalksClub/data-engineering-zoomcamp/blob/main/README.md#prerequisites).

These resources provide a good starting point for anyone interested in learning about data engineering. Let me know if you need more specific information or further details!
